title: CobbleNostalgia Gen 5 Style GUI
description: GUI textures inspired by Classic Pokemon games
body:
This resource pack changes the GUI for Cobblemon to resemble the GUI from classic mainline Pokemon games.

_Currently only in Generation 5 style. Generations 3 and 4 themed packs will be available in the future_


![Battle HUD and hotbar UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c9fbc075ca2e863d9ad1be6af6987e6db52d6e7_0.webp)

This pack also changes the following:
**GUI**
- Hotbar
- Inventory
- Chest
- Crafting Table
- Furnace
- Shulker Box

**Other changes**
- Stat increase/decrease sound effects
- Button sound effects
- Slimmer Minecraft Font
- Main Menu Screen
